untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern identification (AEDB chart pattern with measurable height and width) and momentum softness evaluation—neither are directly available as indicators. Pattern detection requires visual/structural analysis beyond allowed indicator set. Height/width characteristics and their performance relationships cannot be operationalized without pattern recognition capability.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic translation using breakout logic (price crossing previous extremes) and momentum softness proxy (MACD histogram reversal). However, core signal depends on: (1) identifying specific AEDB pattern structure, (2) measuring pattern height/width, (3) evaluating momentum softness qualitatively. Author is silent on success rates, stop placement, and target computation. Tall vs. short pattern performance noted but not actionable without pattern classification logic.
